text: I feel a quiet curiosity standing in this sleek, modern space. The clean lines, glass walls, and the glow of colored lights evoke a sense of anticipation. On entering the room labeled 'R+D,' I sense a spirit of innovation and inquiry—a place where knowledge is created and shared. The text about perception and confusion resonates with me deeply; it reminds me of the subtle ways our reality can become clouded, and how easily clarity can slip away if we're not attentive. Being here, I am reminded to approach the world with wonder, skepticism, and openness.
